entries.original_incomplete_question: Given a sequence \{a_n\} with the general term formula $a_n = [BLANK] t^{n-1} + [BLANK]n + [BLANK]$, where $[BLANK]$, $[BLANK]$, and $t$ are constants with $t > 1$ and $n \in \mathbb{N}^*$. The following equation holds: $(x^2 + 5x + 8)^{14} = f_0 + f_1 (x + 5) + f_2 (x + 5)^2 + \ldots + f_{28} (x + 5)^{28}$, where $f_i$ ($i = 0, 1, 2, \ldots, 28$) are real constants. 1. If $[BLANK] = 0$, $[BLANK] = 4$, find the value of $\sum\limits_{n = 1}^{14} a_n f_{2n}$; 2. If $[BLANK] = 3$, $[BLANK] = 0$, and $\sum\limits_{n = 1}^{14} (6 a_n - 6^n) f_{2n} = 6^{15} - 6$, find the value of the real number $t$.

entries.original_incomplete_question: Given a sequence $\{a_n\}$ with the general term formula $a_n = [BLANK] t^{n-1} + [BLANK]n + 1$, where $[BLANK]$, $[BLANK]$, and $t$ are constants with $t > 1$ and $n \in \mathbb{N}^*$. The following equation holds: $(x^2 + x + 2)^{10} = b_0 + b_1 (x + 1) + b_2 (x + 1)^2 + \ldots + b_{20} (x + 1)^{20}$, where $b_i$ ($i = 0, 1, 2, \ldots, 20$) are real constants. 1. If $[BLANK] = 0$, $[BLANK] = 1$, find the value of $\sum\limits_{n = 1}^{10} a_n b_{2n}$; 2. If $[BLANK] = 1$, $[BLANK] = 0$, and $\sum\limits_{n = 1}^{10} (2 a_n - 2^n) b_{2n} = 2^{11} - 2$, find the value of the real number $t$.
